description_long: This object is a cylindrical juice container with a printed label featuring colorful images of vegetables and possibly fruit, suggesting a vegetable or mixed juice. The label is predominantly brownish-orange with a section that clearly reads 'Salt', and the brand 'Walgreens' is visible. The container appears to be made of cardboard or a similar composite material, with a white, opaque bottom and an open top, indicating it is empty. The label includes a barcode and a nutritional information panel, both partially visible. The surface of the container is slightly glossy, and the graphics are somewhat faded, indicating wear or use.
description: A cylindrical, brown-orange juice container with vegetable illustrations, a 'Walgreens' label, and a white bottom, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the label with nutritional information and part of the vegetable illustration.
description_view_1: Open end of the container, revealing the hollow interior and the barcode on the label.
description_view_2: Side view with the 'Salt' text and the Walgreens brand most clearly visible, along with vegetable graphics.
description_view_3: Bottom view showing the white, opaque base of the container.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: vegetables including tomato, onion, and possibly cucumber
